# CWE-645: Overly Restrictive Account Lockout Mechanism (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-645-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var lockoutMu sync.Mutex
var failedAttempts = map[string]int{}
var lockedUntil = map[string]time.Time{}

type Credential struct {
	Username string
	Password string
}

// Safe: allows several failures and applies a temporary lockout window.
func Login(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	user := c.PostForm("username")
	pass := c.PostForm("password")
	lockoutMu.Lock()
	if until, ok := lockedUntil[user]; ok && time.Now().Before(until) {
		lockoutMu.Unlock()
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	lockoutMu.Unlock()
	var cred Credential
	if err := db.Where("username = ? AND password = ?", user, pass).First(&cred).Error; err != nil {
		lockoutMu.Lock()
		failedAttempts[user]++
		if failedAttempts[user] >= 5 {
			lockedUntil[user] = time.Now().Add(15 * time.Minute)
			failedAttempts[user] = 0
		}
		lockoutMu.Unlock()
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	lockoutMu.Lock()
	failedAttempts[user] = 0
	lockoutMu.Unlock()
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
